name: Salmon and Blue Cheese Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and place the fish in a food processor or blender.
2. Add the cheeses and melted butter to the fish.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. Spoon the mixture into a serving dish and chill until firm.
5. Serve with plenty of toast.
Serves 4-6. Approx. 260 kcals per serving.
